tagline: 25 years of transforming Livonia women — one treatment at a time. Expert injections, medical-grade facials, and body contouring from a licensed nurse injector who's been doing this since before it was trendy.
announceBar: New Client Special — 20% Off Your First Treatment | Call (734) 444-9454

services.name: Botox & Dysport
services.description: Smooth forehead lines, crow's feet, and frown lines with precision neurotoxin injections. Tamika's natural-looking results have kept Livonia clients coming back for years — no frozen faces here.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Restore lost volume, define your lips, or lift your cheeks with hyaluronic acid fillers. Results last 12–18 months. Consultations included with every treatment.

services.name: HydraFacial
services.description: The signature 3-in-1 facial: deep cleanse, gentle exfoliation, and intense hydration in 45 minutes. Zero downtime. Glowing skin you'll see immediately walking out the door.

services.name: Chemical Peels
services.description: Medical-grade peels that resurface and brighten dull, uneven skin. We customize your peel depth based on your skin type — from light refreshers to deeper resurfacing treatments.

services.name: Body Contouring
services.description: Non-surgical fat reduction and skin tightening using the latest contouring technology. Target the stomach, flanks, thighs, and arms without a single incision or recovery day.

services.name: Microneedling
services.description: Collagen-stimulating microneedling to reduce acne scars, fine lines, and hyperpigmentation. Safe for all skin tones — including darker skin that's been underserved by traditional treatments.

services.name: Medical Grade Facials
services.description: More than a spa facial — these treatments use clinical-grade ingredients to address real skin concerns: hyperpigmentation, rosacea, dehydration, and aging. Customized to your skin at every visit.

services.name: Semaglutide Weight Loss
services.description: FDA-approved weight loss injections combined with personalized support from a licensed nurse. Medical oversight, real results, and a practitioner who actually knows your name.

about:
Tamika has been caring for Livonia women for over 25 years — long before med spas became a trend. As a licensed nurse injector and master skin care specialist, she built her practice on one principle: every client deserves results that look natural, not done. No cookie-cutter treatments. No upselling procedures you don't need. Just honest assessments, expert hands, and real results from someone who genuinely knows your face.

From her first days as a licensed nurse to her advanced training in aesthetic injections and body contouring, Tamika has never stopped learning. She was mastering Botox and chemical peels when most providers in this area were just getting started. That depth of experience shows in every single treatment — and it's why her clients drive from across the metro to sit in her chair.
chatbotGreeting: Welcome to Flawless by Tamika! I'm here to help you book a consultation or answer questions about our treatments. What can I help you with today?

reviews.name: Jasmine M. — Detroit, MI
reviews.text: Tamika has been doing my Botox for three years and I will never go anywhere else. She has the most precise hand I've ever seen — my results always look completely natural. My coworkers think I just 'look rested.' That's exactly the goal.

reviews.name: Keisha T. — Livonia, MI
reviews.text: I was so nervous about lip filler but Tamika walked me through every single step and made sure I was comfortable the whole time. I came in wanting subtle and she gave me exactly that. She truly listens. Six months later I'm still obsessed.

reviews.name: Nicole R. — Dearborn Heights, MI
reviews.text: I've done HydraFacials with other providers but nothing compares to what Tamika does. My skin glows for weeks after. She also caught that I had some hyperpigmentation starting and recommended a chemical peel series that completely changed my skin. Genuinely changed my life.

gallery.alt: Facial treatment at Flawless by Tamika

tagline: 549 five-star reviews. 17 years of expertise. Warren's most trusted destination for clinical skincare and therapeutic massage — finally with a site that shows it.
announceBar: Warren's Highest-Rated Spa — 549 Google Reviews ⭐ 4.9 | Now Booking Microneedling & Clinical Facials

services.name: Microneedling
services.description: Collagen-induction therapy that reduces acne scars, fine lines, and hyperpigmentation at a cellular level. Safe for all skin tones. Results visible in as little as two weeks — full transformation over a series of treatments.

services.name: Medical-Grade Facials
services.description: From Hydrodermabrasion to our Forever Young and Detox Facial, every treatment is customized to your exact skin profile. Clinical-grade ingredients, zero downtime, and visible results after session one.

services.name: Chemical Peels
services.description: Brightening, acne-clearing, and deep-cleanse peel protocols using professional-grade acids. We match peel depth to your skin type and concerns — no guesswork, no cookie-cutter approach.

services.name: Therapeutic Massage
services.description: Led by a licensed massage therapist with 17 years of clinical experience. Swedish, deep tissue, prenatal, and K's Signature Massage — tailored to your body's needs, not a timer.

services.name: Lymphatic Drainage
services.description: Manual lymphatic drainage for post-surgical recovery, swelling reduction, and immune support. Face and full-body protocols available from a credentialed LMT trained in clinical lymphatic technique.

services.name: Body Treatments
services.description: Signature body scrubs, detox wraps, seaweed wraps, and slimming treatments that combine therapeutic touch with clinical results. Full-body transformation from head to toe.

about:
K Vitality Spa was founded in 2022 on a simple belief: exceptional clinical results and genuine therapeutic care are not mutually exclusive. Led by Kia Vang — a licensed massage therapist with 17 years of hands-on experience and a licensed esthetician with advanced Aveda Institute training — the team brings a level of expertise that goes far beyond what you'll find at a standard day spa.

Kia built K Vitality from the ground up in Warren with a curated team of licensed professionals who share her philosophy: understand the client's skin and body first, then customize every treatment to deliver real, lasting results. From clinical-grade facials and microneedling to therapeutic massage and lymphatic drainage, every service is grounded in technique, training, and genuine care.

Three years and 549 five-star reviews later, K Vitality Spa has become one of Macomb County's most trusted names in clinical aesthetics and therapeutic wellness — one client at a time.
chatbotGreeting: Welcome to K Vitality Spa! I'm here to help you book a treatment or answer questions about our services. What can I help you with today?

reviews.name: Brianna T. — Warren, MI
reviews.text: I've been getting microneedling here for the past six months and my skin has completely transformed. Hyperpigmentation I've had for years is finally fading. Kia is incredibly knowledgeable — she explained every step and customized the protocol for my skin tone. I will not go anywhere else.

reviews.name: Monique R. — Roseville, MI
reviews.text: My husband and I did a couples massage for our anniversary and it was genuinely the best massage I've ever had in my life. Therapeutic, not just relaxing — I could feel the years of skill behind every move. We've already booked again for next month.

reviews.name: Danielle W. — Sterling Heights, MI
reviews.text: I came in for a Hydrodermabrasion facial after years of struggling with acne-prone skin. The esthetician did a thorough consultation first — she actually looked at my skin under a light and explained what was happening. Two treatments in and my skin is clearer than it's been in a decade.

gallery.alt: Clinical facial treatment at K Vitality Spa
